emails.subject: Cygnifi Non-Disclosure Agreement
emails.body: Cygnifi Non-Disclosure Agreement Brian Attached is the Cygnifi non-disclosure agreement marked to reflect my comments. Please take a look at this when you have a chance, if all is in order, I will be happy to forward to Cygnifi for review and comment. Mark Senior Counsel, EWS Phone: 713-345-8897 Facsimile: 713-646-3490 E-Mail: Mark.Greenberg@enron.com
